goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'leicester' and should 'arrive by 08:00'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'price'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'centre' and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The restaurant should serve 'italian' food.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from leicester and should arrive by 08:00
The train should go to cambridge and should leave on sunday
Make sure you get train ID and price
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the centre and should be in the expensive price range
The restaurant should serve italian food
Make sure you get phone number
